review: Semanko Realty Group was very helpful in my search for a home in the Skagit Valley. My realtor, Machelle Osborne was fantastic, she was able to scout homes for me without my driving up from Seattle all the time.  As we worked together, she knew about my list of things I was looking for and was super helpful sorting out the various pros and cons for all the choices. Machelle was always available to talk, she is super responsive, and she works really hard. Machelle is very dedicated to her clients and she wants you to be happy with your choices and she is instrumental in the process. She is a great resource and a wonderful lady to work with.

SaraBeth was a dream to work with! We were moving to Bellingham from the Seattle-area, which made things a little tough--we had limited availability to see houses ourselves, weren't especially familiar with the area, etc. SaraBeth was so flexible about always being available to show homes (and she showed us quite a few homes!), and has such great local knowledge about the area, both the neighborhood culture and the local real estate market. We wound up finding a place we were sure we would love, but it had competing offers, and we weren't able to get away from work to see it by the time we had to get the offer in, so SaraBeth did a preview and skyped us in real-time. She has a great ability to get a sense of what our needs were, and we were really impressed by how well her commentary matched what we would've said/thought had we been there to tour it ourselves! We decided to go ahead and make an offer, but we were waiting on the sale of our home, so it had to be contingent (automatically less desirable), but SaraBeth still managed to get it for us, and at a price we were really happy with! SaraBeth was extremely helpful with the inspection, explaining how difficult certain repairs were, how much they would cost, whether they were DIY or needed to be done by a professional, etc. And when we had our first buyer on the home we were selling flake out, SaraBeth managed to get the contingency extended (again, tough given that the home had multiple offers before, and contingencies are always a gamble). Once we got the home, she left a beautiful welcome treat for us. We LOVE our new home, SO MUCH, and we are so incredibly grateful we had such a savvy realtor to get us here! We don't intend to move for a looooong time, but if we ever do, we'll definitely be using SaraBeth again, and highly recommend her to anyone looking in her coverage area!!
